source.publisher: Potsdam Institute for Climate Impact Research / PRIMAP team
source.title: The PRIMAP-hist national historical emissions time series (1750–2023)
source.attribution: Gütschow, Busch and Pflüger (2025), PRIMAP-hist v2.6.1 final, https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.15016289, retrieved 2026-07-15. Earth Love United selected HISTTP, KYOTOGHG (AR6GWP100), M.0.EL and converted gigagrams CO2 equivalent per year to megatonnes CO2 equivalent per year.

selection.geographic_boundary: PRIMAP area code mapped only through exact CT-02 ISO alpha-3 identity
limitations: International-bunker treatment is not asserted from the selected CSV rows; verify the PRIMAP category definition before comparison with a frame that includes or excludes bunker memo items.
The selected CSV rows do not provide uncertainty bounds; normalized values must not be presented as uncertainty-free.

candidate_redistribution.description: Redistributable evidence candidates for independent review; not a reviewed public assessment release.
